economic_notes: Michuk Forestry Limited Partnership (99.99% owned GBE) had revenues of $2,787,400 and net income of $132,920 in 2021. Subsequent to year end, Band purchased two manufactured homes for $406,557 financed by CMHC loan of $349,224. Band holds interests in Qwa'eet Forest Products Limited Partnership (12.49%), All Nations Trust Company, and BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing Limited Partnership (0.35%).
notes: Fiscal year end is March 31, 2021 but audit report is dated November 25, 2024 — significant delay of over 3 years between year-end and audit completion. Consolidated entities include Siska Indian Band Operating Fund, Trust Fund, Capital Fund, Skw'akw'iyap Economic Development Corp., and Siska Traditions Society. Michuk Forestry Limited Partnership accounted for by modified equity method as GBE. No long-term debt on balance sheet at year-end; CMHC loan of $349,224 was a subsequent event. No schedule of remuneration provided in the extracted text. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($1,478,131) + Province of BC ($135,291) = $1,613,422; CMHC was $0 in 2021. OSR = $2,885,226 - $1,613,422 = $1,271,804.
